detailed_mermaid:
flowchart TD
  Q["Raw query"] --> R["Prompt router"]
  R --> N["Normalization + tokens"]
  N --> A["Query analysis"]
  A --> M["Metadata selector"]
  M --> P["Planner"]
  P --> S["Route decision"]
  S -->|"SQL_ONLY"| SQL["SQL template + validator"]
  S -->|"SQL_FIRST_API_VERIFY"| SQL
  S -->|"API needed"| API["API template + catalog validator"]
  SQL --> BUD["Plan optimizer + call budget"]
  API --> BUD
  BUD --> SKIP["API skip safety check"]
  SKIP -->|"yes, default-off guard"| SQLONLY["SQL evidence only"]
  SKIP -->|"no / API score may matter"| EXEC["Execute selected plan"]
  SQLONLY --> EV["Evidence bus"]
  EXEC --> DRY["API mode decision"]
  DRY -->|"live credentials"| LIVE["Live API evidence"]
  DRY -->|"missing credentials"| DRYR["Dry-run label"]
  LIVE --> EV
  DRYR --> EV
  EV --> ANS["Answer templates + synthesizer"]
  ANS --> VER["Verifier + reranker"]
  VER --> FINAL["Final answer"]
  FINAL --> TRAJ["Trajectory + reports"]
  M -. "shadow only" .-> ES["Endpoint/schema rules"]
  P -. "shadow only" .-> AST["AST candidate canary"]
  ANS -. "shadow only" .-> RW["Supportable rewrites / LLM search"]
  TRAJ -. "diagnostic" .-> HIDDEN["Hidden-style + readiness checks"]
overview_mermaid:
flowchart LR
  A["User prompt"] --> B["Normalize + route"]
  B --> C["Select metadata/context"]
  C --> D["Plan SQL/API"]
  D --> E["Validate + optimize"]
  E --> F["Execute tools"]
  F --> G["Collect evidence"]
  G --> H["Synthesize answer"]
  H --> I["Verify + rerank"]
  I --> J["Final answer + trajectory"]
  E -. "shadow/canary only" .-> K["Candidate trials"]
  H -. "answer-only trials" .-> L["Rewrite search"]

stages.goal: Choose SQL-only, SQL-first/API-verify, or API-oriented path.
Normalize text and extract quoted entities/tokens.
Classify domain, answer shape, and route intent.
Select compact schema/API context for planning.
stages.key_inputs: schema index, endpoint catalog, relevance scores

stages.goal: Create read-only SQL when local data can ground facts.
stages.key_outputs: validated SQL step or no SQL step

stages.goal: Create endpoint-catalog-valid API calls when required.
stages.key_inputs: endpoint catalog, API templates, grounded params

stages.goal: Dedupe plan steps and enforce call/token budgets.
Execute exactly one selected plan through SQL/API tools.
stages.key_outputs: SQL rows, API result or dry-run label

stages.goal: Record SQL, API, local evidence, and dry-run/live status.
stages.key_outputs: evidence objects for synthesis and audit

stages.goal: Validate answer support and choose safer wording.
Persist audit trail and metrics for evaluation/visualization.
Evaluate answer-shape v2, supportable rewrites, endpoint rules, AST, LLM, and local-index candidates without changing packaged output.
